category_sources: source_facts.description says WCSLIB is a library and utilities for the FITS World Coordinate System.
source_facts.homepage points to the official ATNF/CSIRO WCSLIB page.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description uses the WCSLIB project name and FITS WCS context.
docs_sources: Official ATNF/CSIRO WCSLIB pages document the FITS World Coordinate System library.
source_facts.homepage is the official WCSLIB documentation and distribution surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official ATNF/CSIRO pages provide release archives and documentation, but no official source-control repository was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies FITS World Coordinate System library and utilities.
source_facts.executables lists WCSLIB command-line utilities such as fitshdr and wcsware.
